TYPE Camunda.Orchestration.Sdk.HttpSdkException : sealed class base=Camunda.Orchestration.Sdk.CamundaSdkException interfaces=[System.Runtime.Serialization.ISerializable]
  CTOR (System.String message, System.Int32 status, System.String? operationId = null, System.Exception? inner = null)
  PROP System.Boolean IsBackpressure { get; init; }
